setup: 1 Lv 1.0 Lancer attacker versus 1 Lv 1.0 Marksman defender; Far Seer fields Gordon with all three skills at level 1.

turn_inference.cadence: Skill 2 every 3 turns; Skill 3 every 4 turns
assumptions: No exact turn within the intersection was selected because the screenshots do not identify it.

stats_capture.notes: Only Attack and Defense rows are displayed in the supplied stat panel.
Only Attack and Defense rows are displayed in the supplied stat panel.

hero_skills.name: Venom Infusion
hero_skills.effect: Every 2 attacks, Lancers deal 20% extra damage and poison the target for 1 turn; poisoned enemies deal 4% less damage.

hero_skills.name: Chemical Terror
hero_skills.effect: Increases Lancer Damage Dealt by 30% and reduces Damage Dealt by 6% for all enemy troops for 1 turn every 3 turns.

hero_skills.name: Toxic Release
hero_skills.effect: Increases enemy frontline Infantry Damage Taken by 6% and reduces enemy Marksman Damage Dealt by 6% for 2 turns every 4 turns.

notes: The non-Gordon side's Lancer hero slot is explicitly shown as vacant.
Gordon Skill 1 displayed no trigger; Gordon's side did not deploy Lancers.
Gordon Skill 2 triggered. Its enemy Damage Dealt reduction applies; its own Lancer Damage Dealt increase is inert because Gordon's side did not deploy Lancers.
Gordon Skill 3 triggered; the enemy frontline Infantry component is inert; the enemy Marksman component is inert.
Gordon is shown at hero level 23; the user previously confirmed all Gordon skill levels are level 1.
Only values visible in the supplied screenshots or previously supplied Gordon skill descriptions were recorded.

manual_overrides: The 18 images were grouped sequentially into six battles, three images per battle.
Gordon Skills 1, 2 and 3 were recorded at level 1 based on the user's prior explicit confirmation.
